nodes.name: angular-animations.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular animations covering native CSS animations (v20.2+), advanced CSS animation techniques including state, auto-height, stagger, and programmatic control, plus the legacy animations DSL with transition definitions.

nodes.name: angular-aria.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference for Angular CDK ARIA patterns covering eight headless component types (Accordion, Listbox, Combobox, Menu, Tabs, Toolbar, Tree, Grid) with styling guidelines and agent usage rules for accessible UI composition.
nodes.languageNotes: At 410 lines this is the largest file in the batch; covers the full Angular CDK accessibility toolkit.

nodes.name: cli.md
nodes.summary: Agent-oriented guide to the Angular CLI covering dependency management, code generation via ng generate, the dev server with API proxying, build, testing, and deployment commands.

nodes.name: component-harnesses.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular Material component harnesses explaining why to use harnesses over direct DOM queries, with a concrete MatButtonHarness unit test example and key concepts summary.

nodes.name: component-styling.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular component CSS covering inline styles vs style files, view encapsulation modes, special selectors (:host, :host-context, ::ng-deep), template-embedded styles, and external stylesheet loading.

nodes.name: components.md
nodes.summary: Core Angular component reference covering component definition with @Component decorator, metadata options, component usage in templates, and template control flow syntax (@if, @for, @switch).

nodes.name: creating-services.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular service creation and injection covering the @Injectable decorator, providedIn: 'root' singleton pattern, injecting services into components and other services, and advanced service patterns.

nodes.name: data-resolvers.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular route data resolvers covering resolver creation, route configuration, accessing resolved data via ActivatedRoute or component inputs, error handling, and best practices.

nodes.name: define-routes.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular route definition covering basic configuration, URL path patterns, matching strategies, redirects, page titles, route data/providers, and nested child routes.

nodes.name: defining-providers.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular dependency injection provider definition covering automatic provision with InjectionToken, manual provision strategies, provider scopes, and the library provide* function pattern.

nodes.name: di-fundamentals.md
nodes.summary: Foundational reference for Angular's dependency injection system explaining how DI works, service creation with @Injectable, injecting dependencies via the inject() function, and where injection contexts are available.

nodes.name: e2e-testing.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular end-to-end testing covering test runner setup, test structure, with concrete Cypress and Playwright examples plus best practices.

nodes.name: effects.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular signal side effects covering when and how to use effect() for reactive side effects and afterRenderEffect() for DOM manipulation across render phases.

nodes.name: hierarchical-injectors.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular's hierarchical injector system covering injector hierarchy types, resolution rules, resolution modifiers (@Self, @SkipSelf, @Optional), and the difference between providers and viewProviders.

nodes.name: host-elements.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular component host element interactions covering host property/event bindings via the host metadata object, legacy @HostBinding/@HostListener decorators, binding collision rules, and injecting host attributes.

nodes.name: injection-context.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular injection contexts explaining where inject() can be called, how to use runInInjectionContext() to inject outside of constructor scope, and assertInInjectionContext() for library authors.

nodes.name: inputs.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular component inputs covering signal-based inputs with input(), model inputs for two-way binding, configuration options (required, alias, transform), decorator-based @Input, and best practices.

nodes.name: linked-signal.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular's linkedSignal primitive covering basic usage for derived writable state, advanced usage accounting for previous state, and guidance on when to choose linkedSignal vs computed vs effect.

nodes.name: loading-strategies.md
nodes.summary: Reference for Angular route loading strategies covering eager loading, lazy loading of standalone components and child routes, injection context availability in lazy routes, and recommendations.

nodes.name: mcp.md
nodes.summary: Reference for the Angular CLI MCP server listing available and experimental tools, plus configuration instructions for Antigravity IDE, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and VS Code with command options.
